steps.title: Substitute r = 3 into the first equation
steps.content:
We know from the second equation that $r = 3$. Substitute this into the first equation:

$$s + 7(3) = 27$$

Simplify:

$$s + 21 = 27$$

steps.title: Solve for s and identify the solution
steps.content:
Subtract 21 from both sides:

$$s = 6$$

The solution is $(r, s) = (3, 6)$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
